title: MetaMask Mobile v1 action E2E validation
description: Exercises every Mobile manifest-declared action against mm-4 and leaves trace output for false-positive checks.

prepare-files.cmd:
mkdir -p .agent/recipe-action-validation && printf 'E2E_ACTION_VALIDATION mobile\n' > .agent/recipe-action-validation/probe.txt && printf '{"platform":"mobile","ok":true}
' > .agent/recipe-action-validation/probe.json && printf 'mobile log E2E_ACTION_VALIDATION\n' > .agent/recipe-action-validation/validation.log && echo E2E_ACTION_VALIDATION mobile
prepare-files.detail: Create local files used to prove command/assert/log/artifact actions.

assert-command-exit.intent: Verify the probe command exited successfully
assert-command-exit.detail: Check the previous command exit code.

assert-command-output.intent: Verify the probe command produced expected output
assert-command-output.detail: Check stdout from the previous command.

assert-file.detail: Read the probe text file from the project workspace.

assert-json.detail: Read the probe JSON file and compare $.platform.

watch-logs.detail: Scan the probe log for the validation marker.

index-artifacts.intent: Register the probe file as an artifact
index-artifacts.detail: Add the validation probe to the run artifact manifest.

wait.intent: Verify the base wait action works

status.detail: Confirm the app adapter reports its platform and shape.

cdp-probe.intent: Verify the automation channel is reachable
cdp-probe.detail: Probe CDP/bridge connectivity before UI actions.

fixture.detail: Check the preseeded wallet fixture required by validation.

wallet-setup.detail: Confirm onboarding/fixture state before driving the app.

wallet-unlock.detail: Unlock only if the app is currently locked.

wallet-read-state.detail: Capture selected account and network state without mutating UI.

select-account.detail: Ensure the run uses the configured deterministic account.

app-navigate-wallet.detail: Use the raw React Navigation WalletView route.

ui-wait-wallet.intent: Wait for wallet UI to be visible
ui-wait-wallet.detail: Use the generic UI wait action.

ui-press.detail: Drive a harmless UI press through the platform adapter.

ui-scroll.detail: Scroll the visible app surface through the platform adapter.

ui-screenshot-wallet.detail: Save a screenshot artifact after generic UI actions.

wallet-navigate-perps.intent: Navigate to Perps with a raw app route
wallet-navigate-perps.detail: Use the raw React Navigation PerpsMarketListView route.

perps-navigate-home.intent: Open Perps home with a raw app route
perps-navigate-home.detail: Use the raw React Navigation PerpsMarketListView route.

perps-navigate-market.intent: Open the ETH Perps market with raw route params
perps-navigate-market.detail: Use the raw React Navigation PerpsMarketDetails route and market params.

ensure-clean.detail: Use the reusable Perps position precondition in selected-market cleanup mode.

assert-no-position.intent: Confirm selected ETH position state is clean
assert-no-position.detail: Assert no position exists before placing a validation order.

read-orders-empty.detail: Collect current ETH order state for proof.

place-order.intent: Place a small ETH 3x long validation order
place-order.detail: Create an approximately $11 real Perps position through the runner action.

read-positions.intent: Read ETH position after order placement
read-positions.detail: Collect current ETH position state for proof.

assert-position.intent: Confirm the ETH validation position opened
assert-position.detail: Assert the order produced an open ETH position.

read-orders-open.detail: Collect order state before closing validation artifacts.

assert-closed.detail: Assert no selected ETH position remains after cleanup.

done.detail: Mark the recipe run as passed after all checks complete.

ensure-orders-clean.detail: Use the reusable Perps order precondition in selected-market cleanup mode.

assert-no-orders.intent: Confirm selected ETH order state is clean
assert-no-orders.detail: Assert no orders exist before placing a validation order.

close-orders.intent: Close ETH orders created by validation
close-orders.detail: Clean up any open ETH orders selected by the recipe parameters.

close-positions.detail: Clean up the ETH position selected by the recipe parameters.

start-state.intent: Prepare selected-market clean testnet Perps validation state
start-state.detail: Close existing ETH testnet positions and orders before validation so unrelated leftovers cannot produce false confidence.

teardown-state.intent: Return Perps to a selected-market clean home state
teardown-state.detail: Close remaining ETH positions and orders so the account ends selected-market clean.

app-hud.detail: Show the human reviewer what this validation is doing.

ui-scroll-into-view.intent: Bring the wallet screen into view for proof
ui-scroll-into-view.detail: Exercise the Recipe v1 scroll_into_view contract on React Native.

app-navigate-network-selector.detail: Press the wallet Import token button so Recipe v1 can validate generic text input through a real React Native TextInput.

ui-set-input-network.intent: Set a visible token search value
ui-set-input-network.detail: Exercise ui.set_input on a harmless token search field without changing wallet or Perps state.

return-wallet-after-input.intent: Return to wallet after input validation
return-wallet-after-input.detail: Use the raw React Navigation WalletView route before continuing generic wallet UI proof.

wait-token-search-input.detail: Wait until the Import Token search field is mounted before setting text.
